global.description: The ad features a vibrant green background with a prominent logo and clear messaging.
global.main_message: Encouraging users to save confidently with no hidden fees.

elements.label: Solid green background
elements.description: A smooth, solid green background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant base for the other elements.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: Various abstract shapes in lighter shades of green are scattered across the top, adding visual interest.

elements.label: SwiftStack logo
elements.description: The logo features the word 'SwiftStack' in bold, modern typography, prominently displayed in white against the green background.

elements.label: Main message text
elements.description: The text reads 'Save with confidence' in a clean, sans-serif font, centered and in white for high visibility.

elements.label: Additional message text
elements.description: The phrase 'No hidden fees' appears below the main message in a smaller font, also in white.

elements.label: Small circle
elements.description: A small, solid circle in a lighter green shade is positioned towards the top left, adding a decorative touch.

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A rectangular button at the bottom with rounded edges, featuring the text 'Claim reward' in bold, inviting font.

elements.label: Additional shape
elements.description: A rectangular shape in a lighter green shade is placed in the center, contributing to the abstract design.

elements.label: Headline text
elements.description: The word 'SwiftStack' is prominently displayed at the top in a large, bold font, ensuring it captures attention.

elements.label: Secondary message text
elements.description: The text 'Save with confidence No hidden fees' is centered at the bottom, providing reassurance to the viewer.
elements.text_content: Save with confidence No hidden fees

elements.label: Claim reward text
elements.description: The text 'Claim reward' is displayed in a smaller font, encouraging user action at the bottom of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, rewarded_video, modern minimalist with abstract shapes, SwiftStack logo, save with confidence message
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the main message and additional text in the center, with the CTA button at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: SwiftStack, Save with confidence, No hidden fees, Claim reward
